title: T-034 — QA-004 Test Templates page + template_create_modal (parity)
prompt:
# T-034 — QA-004 Test Templates page + template_create_modal

PRD: 09-QUALITY-PRD.md §8.5 row '(extra) Test Templates QA-004' (FR-QA-004), §8.5 prototypes qa_templates + template_create_modal
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Build `/quality/templates` Server Component listing inspection test templates (catalog of reusable parameter sets) plus TemplateCreateModal Client Component to add a new template (name, description, parameters JSONB).

## Implementation contract
1. Drizzle migration `packages/db/migrations/0122_quality_test_templates.sql` adds quality_test_templates table {id, org_id, code, label, parameters JSONB, created_by, created_at, ext_jsonb} with RLS tenant_isolation and UNIQUE(org_id, code).
2. Server Action `createTestTemplate(input)` validates uniqueness + non-empty parameters.
3. List page reads listTestTemplates(filters); columns Code | Label | Param count | Created by | Updated.
4. 1:1 parity vs `design/Monopilot Design System/quality/other-screens.jsx:3-54` (qa_templates) and `quality/modals.jsx:209-245` (template_create_modal).

## Files
- packages/db/migrations/0122_quality_test_templates.sql [create]
- apps/web/src/app/quality/templates/page.tsx [create]
- apps/web/src/server/quality/templates.ts [create]
- apps/web/src/components/quality/templates/TemplateCreateModal.tsx [create]
- apps/web/src/components/quality/templates/__tests__/templates.test.tsx [create]
- design/Monopilot Design System/quality/other-screens.jsx [ref]
- design/Monopilot Design System/quality/modals.jsx [ref]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given the page renders, when compared to design/Monopilot Design System/quality/other-screens.jsx:3-54, then it has parity with the prototype on structure (filter input + Add Template button + 5-col Table Code/Label/ParamCount/CreatedBy/Updated), visuals (shadcn Table/Input/Button only), and interaction (row click → template detail (P2 stub), Add Template opens TemplateCreateModal) — verified by RTL plus parity checklist in pipeline_inputs.details
2. Given the modal renders, when compared to design/Monopilot Design System/quality/modals.jsx:209-245, then it has parity on structure (header + code + label + parameters JSONB Editor + Cancel/Create footer), visuals (shadcn Dialog/Form/Input/Textarea/Button), and interaction (Create disabled until code length>=3 and parameters non-empty) — verified by RTL plus parity checklist
3. Given a duplicate code submitted, when createTestTemplate runs, then it rejects with V-QA-TEMPLATE-DUP and writes nothing

pipeline_inputs.description: Quality test templates list + create modal; parity with qa_templates and template_create_modal prototypes.
pipeline_inputs.details: Migration adds quality_test_templates table with RLS+UNIQUE. Page lists templates; modal creates with Zod validation. shadcn primitives only.
out_of_scope: Do not implement template-to-spec materialization (out of scope)
acceptance_criteria: Given the page renders, when compared to design/Monopilot Design System/quality/other-screens.jsx:3-54, then it has parity on structure (filter input + Add Template button + 5-col Table Code/Label/ParamCount/CreatedBy/Updated), visuals (shadcn primitives only), and interaction (row click stub-routes, Add Template opens TemplateCreateModal) — verified by RTL plus parity checklist in pipeline_inputs.details

Given the modal renders, when compared to design/Monopilot Design System/quality/modals.jsx:209-245, then it has parity on structure (header + code + label + parameters editor + Cancel/Create footer), visuals (shadcn Dialog/Form/Input/Textarea/Button), and interaction (Create disabled until code length>=3 and parameters non-empty) — verified by RTL plus parity checklist
Given a duplicate code submitted, when createTestTemplate runs, then it rejects with V-QA-TEMPLATE-DUP and writes nothing
test_strategy: RED: write apps/web/src/components/quality/templates/__tests__/templates.test.tsx asserting parity structure, dup rejection, RLS via two tenant set-up
risk_red_lines: Do not allow duplicate code per tenant
Do not skip RLS on quality_test_templates
